summary: Census block racial composition data for Bay Area showing population in two-race, three-race, and four-race combinations.
ACS 2018-2022 age and sex distribution data for the AB617 East Oakland community, with 5-year age group counts by sex.
ACS 2018-2022 rent burden data for AB617 East Oakland community, showing cost-burdened and severely cost-burdened households.
ACS 2018-2022 poverty level data for AB617 East Oakland community, showing population at various income-to-poverty ratios.
Bay Area Vital Signs census tract commute mode choice data with driving, transit, biking, walking, and carpooling shares by year.
